BB Learn, by BrainBack

An AI tutor that talks like a real teacher. For every student.

BB Learn speaks with each child, shows the lesson on screen, and helps fix every mistake - one at a time, in their own language.

Watch it teach See how it works
Live and teaching real students today
How it works

It teaches in three simple moves.

Step 1

It talks

A friendly voice explains the lesson, just like a patient teacher - and speaks your child's language.

Step 2

It shows

Whatever it says appears on the screen - pictures, examples, things to try. Kids learn by doing.

Step 3

It helps fix mistakes

When a child gets stuck, it notices, waits, and gently guides them to the right answer.

Real classes, real kids

Don't take our word for it. Watch.

Two real lessons, recorded as they happened. Press play - the sound is the teacher.

Real lesson · Grade 7 · Science

The shy one

His parents thought he wouldn't say a word. He answered every question - and couldn't hide the smile.

Tap play · sound on
BB LearnWhat kind of motion is a ball rolling on a straight road?
StudentLinear motion.
BB LearnPerfect. That's exactly right.
BB LearnAnd a pendulum swinging back and forth?
Student[gives his answer]
BB LearnSpot on. You've got the hang of this.

A child who was expected to stay quiet answered three in a row - and stayed for more.

Real lesson · Grade 8 · English

The one who couldn't sit still

Curious and racing ahead. BB Learn slowed him down and made sure he actually got it right.

Tap play · sound on
StudentOkay, but can we do another example?
BB LearnFirst, let's finish this one and get it right.
BB LearnTry the full sentence for me.
Student...he had been sleeping.
BB LearnThat's it. You nailed it.

It didn't just give the answer. It waited until he could say it himself.
